'''鈭歽-t-t''' ('''kayatat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quern|quern]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quern|quern]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-t-t
|-
! Lemma
| kayatat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyatat|thiyatat]] || [[word:jiyatat|jiyatat]] || [[word:shiyatat|shiyatat]] || [[word:kiyatat|kiyatat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyatat|thuthuyatat]] || [[word:jujuyatat|jujuyatat]] || [[word:shushuyatat|shushuyatat]] || [[word:kukuyatat|kukuyatat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyatat|thuyatat]] || [[word:juyatat|juyatat]] || [[word:shuyatat|shuyatat]] || [[word:kuyatat|kuyatat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyatat|thuyatat]] || [[word:juyatat|juyatat]] || [[word:shuyatat|shuyatat]] || [[word:kuyatat|kuyatat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyatat|theyatat]] || [[word:jeyatat|jeyatat]] || [[word:sheyatat|sheyatat]] || [[word:keyatat|keyatat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyatat|thothoyatat]] || [[word:jojoyatat|jojoyatat]] || [[word:shoshoyatat|shoshoyatat]] || [[word:kokoyatat|kokoyatat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyatat|thoyatat]] || [[word:joyatat|joyatat]] || [[word:shoyatat|shoyatat]] || [[word:koyatat|koyatat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyatat|thoyatat]] || [[word:joyatat|joyatat]] || [[word:shoyatat|shoyatat]] || [[word:koyatat|koyatat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yatat|th忙yatat]] || [[word:j忙yatat|j忙yatat]] || [[word:sh忙yatat|sh忙yatat]] || [[word:k忙yatat|k忙yatat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayatat|thathayatat]] || [[word:jajayatat|jajayatat]] || [[word:shashayatat|shashayatat]] || [[word:kakayatat|kakayatat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayatat|thayatat]] || [[word:jayatat|jayatat]] || [[word:shayatat|shayatat]] || [[word:kayatat|kayatat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayatat|thayatat]] || [[word:jayatat|jayatat]] || [[word:shayatat|shayatat]] || [[word:kayatat|kayatat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayatat|shayatat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayatat|goshayatat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayatat|gokishayatat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayatatn眉|shayatatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayatatnkn眉|goshayatatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayatatn眉|gokishayatatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayatatsh毛|shayatatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayatatnksh毛|goshayatatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayatatsh毛|gokishayatatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayatatro|shayatatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayatatnkro|goshayatatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayatatro|gokishayatatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatatmu|shayatatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayatatnkmu|goshayatatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayatatmu|gokishayatatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayatatsher|shayatatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayatatnksher|goshayatatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayatatsher|gokishayatatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayatatng|shayatatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayatatnkng|goshayatatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayatatng|gokishayatatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayatatya|shayatatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayatatnkya|goshayatatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayatatya|gokishayatatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayatatyam|shayatatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayatatnkyam|goshayatatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayatatyam|gokishayatatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayatatn眉sh毛|shayatatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayatatnkn眉sh毛|goshayatatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayatatn眉sh毛|gokishayatatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayatatn眉ro|shayatatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayatatnkn眉ro|goshayatatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayatatn眉ro|gokishayatatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatatn眉mu|shayatatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayatatnkn眉mu|goshayatatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayatatn眉mu|gokishayatatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayatatsh毛n眉|shayatatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayatatnksh毛n眉|goshayatatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayatatsh毛n眉|gokishayatatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayatatsh毛ro|shayatatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayatatnksh毛ro|goshayatatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayatatsh毛ro|gokishayatatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatatsh毛mu|shayatatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayatatnksh毛mu|goshayatatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayatatsh毛mu|gokishayatatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayatatron眉|shayatatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayatatnkron眉|goshayatatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayatatron眉|gokishayatatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayatatrosh毛|shayatatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayatatnkrosh毛|goshayatatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayatatrosh毛|gokishayatatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatatromu|shayatatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayatatnkromu|goshayatatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayatatromu|gokishayatatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayatatmun眉|shayatatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayatatnkmun眉|goshayatatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayatatmun眉|gokishayatatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayatatmush毛|shayatatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayatatnkmush毛|goshayatatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayatatmush毛|gokishayatatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayatatmuro|shayatatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayatatnkmuro|goshayatatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayatatmuro|gokishayatatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
